top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s rally and HYPE’s record run mask a market still waiting for real conviction, analysts say
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin held above $66,000 after the Iran truce as HYPE hit a fresh ATH above $76, but Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged thin ETF conviction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
